headline: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
summary: Consumers are seeing fuel prices rapidly rise as the Iran war has triggered the biggest oil supply disruption in history.

raw.headline: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices

headline: Trump waives U.S. shipping law for 60 days to steady oil market
summary: The Trump administration "remains committed to continuing to strengthen our critical supply chains" amid the Iran war, press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

raw.headline: Trump waives U.S. shipping law for 60 days to steady oil market
